div.p: Raft Protocol: Technical implementation detail for Snapshot Log truncation.

g.text: Case A: Snapshot Covers Entire Log (LastIncludedIndex > logLastIndex)
Case B: Log Extends Beyond Snapshot (Partial Truncation)

div.p: Action: 5 > 3 → Entire log is stale relative to snapshot. Full Truncation.
Action: 3 < 6 → Entries 1-3 are covered by snapshot. Discard prefix, keep suffix.
